# AccessoryControlDevice.Capabilities

**Structure**

A set of capabilities that an audio accessory supports.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Capabilities
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.audioaccessorykit/documentation/AudioAccessoryKit/AccessoryControlDevice] class’s initializer takes an argument of this type. Use this structure to specify which features your accessory supports when initializing an audio accessory configuration.

## Capability options

- **audioSwitching**: A capability indicating the device supports automatic audio switching.
- **placement**: A capability indicating the device supports placement detection.

## Device characteristics

- **AccessoryControlDevice.Placement**: The physical placement of an audio accessory.
- **AccessoryControlDevice.Configuration**: The configuration for an accessory.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
